tool.name: EnzyWizard Batch
tool.description: Run a complete EnzyWizard analysis workflow
tool.command:
exec 3>&1 4>&2; exec > enzywizard.log 2>&1;
#set $input_name = $input_path.element_identifier #set $msa_name = $input_msa.element_identifier ln -s '$input_path' '$input_name' && ln -s '$input_msa' '$msa_name' && enzywizard-batch -i '$input_name' -m '$msa_name' #if $advanced.substrate_names: -s '$advanced.substrate_names' #end if $advanced.save_extra_outputs --hydrocluster_cutoff '$advanced.hydrocluster_cutoff' $advanced.no_minimize_energy --energy_minimization_iteration '$advanced.minimization_iteration' --flexibility_method '$advanced.flexibility_method' --flexibility_cutoff '$advanced.flexibility_cutoff' --flexibility_n_modes '$advanced.flexibility_n_modes' --disorder_window_size '$advanced.disorder_window_size' --disorder_min_region_length '$advanced.disorder_min_region_length' --embedding_model_name '$advanced.embedding_model_name' --pocket_min_rad '$advanced.pocket_min_rad' --pocket_max_rad '$advanced.pocket_max_rad' --pocket_min_volume '$advanced.pocket_min_volume' --substrate_max_synonyms '$advanced.substrate_max_synonyms' --substrate_fp_radius '$advanced.substrate_fp_radius' --substrate_n_bits '$advanced.substrate_n_bits' --substrate_num_confs '$advanced.substrate_num_confs' --substrate_prune_rms '$advanced.substrate_prune_rms' --dock_max_attempt_num '$advanced.dock_max_attempt_num' $advanced.dock_no_early_stop --dock_exhaustiveness '$advanced.dock_exhaustiveness' --dock_cpu "\${GALAXY_SLOTS:-1}" #if $advanced.dock_catalytic_residue: --dock_catalytic_residue '$advanced.dock_catalytic_residue' #end if #if $advanced.dock_catalytic_site_coord: --dock_catalytic_site_coord '$advanced.dock_catalytic_site_coord' #end if #if $advanced.dock_box_size: --dock_box_size '$advanced.dock_box_size' #end if --hbond_bonded_h_min_distance '$advanced.hbond_bonded_h_min_distance' --hbond_bonded_h_max_distance '$advanced.hbond_bonded_h_max_distance' --hbond_da_max_distance '$advanced.hbond_da_max_distance' --hbond_ha_max_distance '$advanced.hbond_ha_max_distance' --hbond_angle '$advanced.hbond_angle' --ionic_distance_cutoff '$advanced.ionic_distance_cutoff' --vdw_mu '$advanced.vdw_mu' --ppstack_center_distance_cutoff '$advanced.ppstack_center_distance_cutoff' --pication_distance_cutoff '$advanced.pication_distance_cutoff' --pication_angle_cutoff '$advanced.pication_angle_cutoff' --ssbond_max_distance '$advanced.ssbond_max_distance' -o ./
tool.help: Run a complete EnzyWizard analysis workflow. The wrapper symlinks Galaxy file inputs into the job working directory and captures the tool-created output directory/files as a Galaxy discovered collection.
